channel.title: Thoughts on Aldy's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Thoughts on Aldy's Blog

item.title: Bingeing Manga
item.description: Been bingeing on some manga these weeks, Dandadan was so good that I finish it less than 3 days and now I craving for the next chapters, 20th century boys too, it give some stranger things vibes with different approach, and I think someday, when this got any chance to be animated, King gnu should be the one making it’s soundtrack and songs.
